'''Oosk''' was a patron of [[Vanster Enan's Sop House]] during [[Gadrin]]'s celebrations for the 200th anniversary of the city's founding. He spent most of the day arm-wrestling with [[Varoca]]. Despite the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee's]] greater strength, Oosk won about half the time, but [[Nance]] gave 3:1 odds against him.

{{Char-stub}}
